summary: Excellent audience recording with a crystal‑clear Birdsong mix; the show is praised as nice overall.
review: The behind‑the‑stage (audience) capture is hailed as the best‑sounding version on the archive, with very good clarity and a dialed‑in mix by Birdsong. Reviewers also note that the performance itself was enjoyable, though no specific songs are highlighted.

ai_rating.rationale: A single positive review emphasizes superb recording quality and a pleasant show, leading to a high rating despite limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Very good sound; mix is expertly balanced by Birdsong, described as the best‑sounding audience version on the archive.
